# beIN Meditech

> Empowering Care, Enhancing Life — Medical Technology Solutions for Healthcare Facilities Worldwide

beIN Meditech is a leading medical technology company headquartered in Lübeck, Germany with an office in Istanbul, Turkey. Founded over 10 years ago on the principles of innovation, quality, and integrity, beIN Meditech advances healthcare by providing cutting-edge medical devices and advanced IT solutions.

## Company Overview

- **Full name:** beIN Meditech (beinmeditech.com)
- **Founded:** 2013+
- **Headquarters:** Kirchwerderstraße 12, 23556 Lübeck, Germany
- **Second office:** Bahçeşehir 34488, Istanbul, Turkey
- **Phone:** +49 1575 031 64 00
- **Email:** info@beinmeditech.com
- **Website:** https://beinmeditech.com

## Mission & Vision

**Mission:** To empower the healthcare industry by providing cutting-edge medical devices and innovative IT solutions, enhancing patient care and medical practices globally.

**Vision:** To establish beIN Meditech as a leading force in the medical technology sector, renowned for quality, innovation, and seamless integration of healthcare technology solutions worldwide.

## Services

### Medical Devices Trading
Trading of state-of-the-art medical devices including diagnostic equipment, therapeutic devices, and surgical tools across specialties: cardiology, neurology, orthopedics, and more. Global sourcing from certified manufacturers with full after-sales support.
- Page: https://beinmeditech.com/services/medical-devices-trading

### Software & Hardware Consultation
Expert consulting for medical software and hardware integration. Comprehensive system assessments, seamless integration, advanced security protocols, and continuous support.
- Page: https://beinmeditech.com/services/software-and-hardware-consultation

### Training & Support Services
Customized training programs and dedicated technical support for healthcare professionals. Regular updates, refresher sessions, and proactive problem-solving to maximize technology utilization.
- Page: https://beinmeditech.com/services/training-and-support-services

### Custom IT Solutions for Healthcare
Tailored software development for healthcare management. Secure, compliant, scalable architecture with seamless integration into existing infrastructure.
- Page: https://beinmeditech.com/services/custom-it-solutions-for-healthcare

### Medical Integration Services
Seamless integration of new technologies with existing healthcare systems. Comprehensive system analysis, custom planning, efficient implementation, and post-integration optimization.
- Page: https://beinmeditech.com/services/medical-integration-services

## Key Achievements

- Solutions deployed in 30+ countries globally
- 5 patented medical technologies
- 95% customer retention rate
- 8+ global brand partnerships
- 10+ years in the medical technology sector
- 500+ satisfied clients
